text: A single tooth can rewrite the story of human migration. Ancient DNA, or aDNA, reveals secrets buried for millennia, shedding light on our ancestors' journeys. With each discovery, we unearth migrations that historical records never captured. Using cutting-edge techniques, scientists analyze bones and teeth, mapping ancient genetic paths. But as more samples come in, our understanding evolves, revealing complexities we never imagined. Imagine a world where history is constantly rewritten by new evidence. That’s the power of aDNA. Curious about how DNA can change our past? Hit like and follow for more incredible discoveries!
